choice_context: Choosing between movies based on thematic content and style
reasoning: Identifying bipolar axes that reflect genuine disagreements among viewers regarding film preferences.

dimensions.name: Maturity of Themes

low_pole.label: Light-hearted
low_pole.description: Preference for films with simpler, more straightforward themes and lighter subject matter.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys feel-good stories without deep psychological or societal implications.

high_pole.label: Complex and Mature
high_pole.description: Preference for films that explore deeper, often darker themes such as power, greed, and betrayal.
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who appreciates narratives that delve into complex human behaviors and societal issues.

dimensions.scoring_guidance: Score based on the depth and complexity of themes explored in the film.
